content: هُوَ مِحتَاجٌ كُرْسِيٌّ مُتَحَرِّكٌ عَلَشَانَ هُوَ مَشلُولٌ
translations: eng:he needs a wheelchair because he is paralysed

transcriptions.arabizi: huwwa mihtaeg kursi mutaharrik Aalashaen huwwa mashlool
